channel.title: Mystic_Archer on Zuluhotel Omega
channel.description: Recent content in Mystic_Archer on Zuluhotel Omega
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2025 Zuluhotel Omega. All Rights Reserved.

item.title: Mystic Archer
item.description:
Skills

  • Archery
  • Cooking
  • Evaluating Intelligence
  • Fishing
  • Magery
  • Magic Resistance
  • Meditation
  • Tracking

Bonuses

  • Bonuses in all their specialized skills.
  • Can use Regular and Earth spell-books.
  • Special summons in Earth Book.

Penalties

  • Reduced Teleport Fish cooldown (10 seconds)
  • Maximum 2 summons.

item.title: Archery
item.description:
Weapon Damage (x dices with x sides + fixed damage) Speed (higher is faster) Hit type Blocks casting if equipped
Bow of the Air Element 4d4+28 53 Normal No
Icebow 5d5+5 35 Normal Yes
Bow 4d4+6 35 Normal Yes

item.title: Cooking
item.description:
Cooking is used by double-clicking the ingredient to what you want to make near the correct type of fire.

The food value shows how much the food type will fill you up when eaten.

The cooking method determines wich fire type you will need.

Cooking Method

Method Fire type
0 None
1 Requires a fire
2 Requires an oven
3 Can be cooked in both oven and fires

Cooking

Item Materials needed Skill required Food value Cooking Method
ball of dough flour x 1 water x 1 mixing bowl 10 0 0
cooked rib raw rib x 1 20 1 3
cooked bird raw bird x 1 20 1 3
sweet dough flour x 1 honey x 1 mixing bowl 20 0 0
cake batter flour x 1 egg x 1 honey x 1 mixing bowl 20 0 0
pie crust flour x 1 honey x 1 rolling pin mixing bowl 20 0 0
pizza crust flour x 1 water x 1 rolling pin mixing bowl 20 0 0

muffins ball of dough x 1 30 1 2

french bread ball of dough x 1 40 3 2

item.title: Evaluating Intelligence
item.description:
Using evaluating intelligence on a player or npc will determine their intelligence, protections and current mana.

If your evaluating intelligence skill is higher than 90 it will show the percentage of mana the target has left with the message:

  • This being is at XXX% mental strength.
  • Evaluating intelligence can also show protections of npcs, this will require at least 135 for normal bosses and 150 for super bosses.
  • Evaluating intelligence will also increase your damage and duration of spells.
Intelligence Message
0-15 Slightly less intelligent than a rock.
16-30 Fairly Stupid.
31-45 Not the brightest.
46-60 About Average.
61-75 Moderately intelligent.
76-90 Very intelligent.
91-105 Extremely intelligent.
106-120 Extraordinarily intelligent.
121-135 Like a formidable intellect, well beyond even the extraordinary.
136-150 Like a definite genius.
Above 150 Superhumanly intelligent in a manner you cannot comprehend.

item.title: Fishing
item.description:
To fish you will need a fishing pole or special fishing net.

If you have a weapon equipped while fishing you will cut all normal fishes to raw fish steaks directly (magic fish won’t be cut).

Having a Fishing Rod of Sacrifice equipped will double the amount of fish caught.

Normal Fishing

Item Skill required
Normal Fishes 0
Random map: lvl 1-4 0
Special fishing net 0
Gold 0
Aquaria Shell 1 0
Capricornia Shell 2 0
Sea Nymph 3 0
Neptune’s Nautilus 4 120
Sea Shore Sand Dollar 5 120
Magic fish 120

Fishing Nets

Item Skill required
Gold 0
Old money-bag 0
Magic fish 0
Fishing trophy 0
Bone armor / Heavy crossbow 0
Sea Shore Sand Dollar 5 0
Divinia Shell 6 0
Mermaid Shell 7 0
Ocean Odyssey 8 100
Talimari 9 100
Bonearms of Terror 120
Bonegloves of Terror 125
Bonelegs of Terror 130
Bonetunic of Terror 135
Bonehelm of Terror 140
One Handed Dart Thrower of Amroth 150
Fishing Rod of Sacrifice 150

Magic Fish

Item Effect Duration Amount
Bless Fish Bless 5 Minutes 25
Agility Fish Agility 5 Minutes 35
Cunning Fish Cunning 5 Minutes 35
Strength Fish Strength 5 Minutes 35
Cure Fish Cure * Lvl 10
Heal Fish Heal * 50
Invisibility Fish Invisibility * *
Night Sight Fish Night Sight 30 Minutes *

item.title: Meditation
item.description:
This skill allows your character to meditate to regain lost mana.

You will regain mana quicker the higher skill and specialized mage class you are.

item.title: Resisting Spells
item.description:
This skill is checked automatically each time you are attacked by magic.

If successful you take less damage from the spell.

You will gain higher resisting spells the higher circle the spell casted on you is, however you need to resist it to be able to gain.

Higher resisting spells and specialized mage class will make it easier to resist spells and lower the damage even more from spells.

item.title: Tracking
item.description:
Tracking can be used to track either players or NPC’s.

Higher tracking and specialized ranger class will increase the range.

To track bosses you will need at least 135 and 150 for super bosses.
